title: Cephalorrhynchus soongoricus
taxonomy: Cephalorrhynchus soongoricus is classified as a species of extinct mammal in the family Taenodactylidae. It belongs to the order Pterosuchia, a group of extinct mammals that are closely related to the monotremes. The exact classification of Cephalorrhynchus soongoricus is still being researched and debated by paleontologists. However, it is generally agreed that this species is a type of mammal that lived during the Eocene epoch. Further study of its fossil remains is needed to confirm its exact classification within the mammalian order.
